description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The display shows a colorful home screen with app icons, a status bar, and a subtle wallpaper gradient. The back is glossy black with a prominent silver Apple logo centered and a triple-lens camera array in the top left corner, each lens encircled by metallic rings. The sides are thin and appear to be made of metal, with visible buttons for volume and power. The device is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use, with a premium finish and minimalistic design. No external case or cover is present, and the phone's surfaces are highly reflective and smooth.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a silver Apple logo on the glossy back. The device features a premium, minimalist design with metallic side buttons and no external case.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass touchscreen with colorful app icons and a thin black bezel.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim profile and visible side buttons, with no screen or camera visible.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the glossy black surface, centered silver Apple logo, and triple camera array in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the slim profile and additional side buttons, with no screen or camera visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting against the glossy black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful home screen with app icons, a status bar at the top, and a gradient wallpaper. Visible apps include Calendar, Photos, Weather, Maps, and others, with no notifications present.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with metallic rings around each lens and a slight camera bump.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on both the left and right edges: two volume buttons and a mute switch on the left, and a power button on the right. All buttons are slim and rectangular.
